metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE
	VAR __SQDS1FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('DateTable'[Date])),
			'DateTable'[Date] <= (DATE(2026, 2, 27) + (TIME(18, 35, 4) + (0.0345348 / 86400)))
		)

	VAR __SQDS1Core = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
					'DateTable'[Date],
					__SQDS1FilterTable,
					"ExistsPredicate", COUNTROWS('fact_popularity')
				)
			),
			NOT(ISBLANK('DateTable'[Date]))
		)

	VAR __SQDS1BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1, __SQDS1Core, 'DateTable'[Date], 0)

	VAR __SQDS0Core = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
					'fact_popularity'[loaddate],
					'DateTable'[Date],
					__SQDS1BodyLimited,
					__SQDS1FilterTable,
					"ExistsPredicate", COUNTROWS('fact_popularity')
				)
			),
			OR(
				NOT(ISBLANK('fact_popularity'[loaddate])),
				NOT(ISBLANK('DateTable'[Date]))
			)
		)

EVALUATE
	GROUPBY(
		__SQDS0Core,
		"Minloaddate", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), 'fact_popularity'[loaddate], TRUE)
	)

EVALUATE
	ROW(
	"M_BingeWorthy", 'Key Measures'[M_BingeWorthy]
)

EVALUATE
	ROW(
	"M_QuickWatch", 'Key Measures'[M_QuickWatch]
)

EVALUATE
	ROW(
	"M_OnComing", 'Key Measures'[M_OnComing]
)

EVALUATE
	ROW(
	"M_GlobalReach", 'Key Measures'[M_GlobalReach]
)

EVALUATE
	ROW(
		"MinScore", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Score])),
		"MaxScore", CALCULATE(MAX('dim_content'[Score]))
	)

EVALUATE
	ROW(
		"MinPopularity", CALCULATE(MIN('fact_popularity'[Popularity])),
		"MaxPopularity", CALCULATE(MAX('fact_popularity'[Popularity]))
	)

EVALUATE
	ROW(
		"MinYear", CALCULATE(MIN('LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year])),
		"MaxYear", CALCULATE(MAX('LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year]))
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
			"M_Content_Trending", 'Key Measures'[M_Content_Trending],
			"M_TotalContent", 'Key Measures'[M_TotalContent]
		)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(22, __DS0Core, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	'dim_content'[TypeDisplay]

DEFINE
	VAR __SQDS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_network'[Networks],
			"SumPopularity", CALCULATE(SUM('fact_popularity'[Popularity]))
		)

	VAR __SQDS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(10, __SQDS0Core, [SumPopularity], 0)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_network'[Poster],
			__SQDS0BodyLimited,
			"SumPopularity", CALCULATE(SUM('fact_popularity'[Popularity]))
		)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1002, __DS0Core, [SumPopularity], 0, 'dim_network'[Poster], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	[SumPopularity] DESC, 'dim_network'[Poster]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
					'dim_content'[Poster],
					'dim_content'[Title],
					'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
					'dim_content'[Genres],
					'dim_content'[Release Date],
					'dim_content'[OncomingDaysLeftDisplay],
					'dim_content'[Cast],
					'dim_content'[OverviewShort],
					'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
					'dim_content'[Production Companies],
					"MinHomepage", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Homepage])))
				)
			),
			OR(
				OR(
					OR(
						OR(
							OR(
								OR(
									OR(
										OR(
											OR(
												NOT(ISBLANK('dim_content'[Poster])),
												NOT(ISBLANK('dim_content'[Title]))
											),
											NOT(ISBLANK('dim_content'[TypeDisplay]))
										),
										NOT(ISBLANK('dim_content'[Genres]))
									),
									NOT(ISBLANK('dim_content'[Release Date]))
								),
								NOT(ISBLANK('dim_content'[OncomingDaysLeftDisplay]))
							),
							NOT(ISBLANK('dim_content'[Cast]))
						),
						NOT(ISBLANK('dim_content'[OverviewShort]))
					),
					NOT(ISBLANK('dim_content'[Sub Genres]))
				),
				NOT(ISBLANK('dim_content'[Production Companies]))
			)
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			501,
			__DS0Core,
			'dim_content'[Poster],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Title],
			1,
			'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Genres],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Release Date],
			1,
			'dim_content'[OncomingDaysLeftDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Cast],
			1,
			'dim_content'[OverviewShort],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Production Companies],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'dim_content'[Poster],
	'dim_content'[Title],
	'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
	'dim_content'[Genres],
	'dim_content'[Release Date],
	'dim_content'[OncomingDaysLeftDisplay],
	'dim_content'[Cast],
	'dim_content'[OverviewShort],
	'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
	'dim_content'[Production Companies]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_content'[Poster],
			'dim_content'[Title],
			'dim_content'[Genres],
			'dim_content'[Score],
			'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
			'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
			'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
			'dim_content'[Tagline],
			'dim_content'[Language],
			'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
			"M_Rank_Today", 'Key Measures'[M_Rank Today],
			"M_Display_RankChangeToday", 'Key Measures'[M_Display_RankChangeToday],
			"M_TotalRevenue", 'Key Measures'[M_TotalRevenue],
			"v_M_TotalRevenue_FormatString", IGNORE('Key Measures'[_M_TotalRevenue FormatString]),
			"MinHomepage", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Homepage]))),
			"MinTrailer", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Trailer]))),
			"CountScore", IGNORE(CALCULATE(COUNTA('dim_content'[Score]))),
			"M_RankChangeToday", IGNORE('Key Measures'[M_RankChangeToday])
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			501,
			__DS0Core,
			'dim_content'[Poster],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Title],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Genres],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Score],
			1,
			'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
			1,
			'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Tagline],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Language],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	GROUPBY(
		__DS0Core,
		"MinCountScore", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [CountScore]),
		"MaxCountScore", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [CountScore])
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'dim_content'[Poster],
	'dim_content'[Title],
	'dim_content'[Genres],
	'dim_content'[Score],
	'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
	'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
	'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
	'dim_content'[Tagline],
	'dim_content'[Language],
	'dim_content'[Sub Genres]

DEFINE
	VAR __SQDS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS('dim_content'[Title], "M_Rank_Today", 'Key Measures'[M_Rank Today])

	VAR __SQDS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(10, __SQDS0Core, [M_Rank_Today], 1)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_content'[Poster],
			'dim_content'[Title],
			'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
			'dim_content'[Genres],
			'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
			'dim_content'[RuntimeUnited],
			'dim_content'[Cast],
			'dim_content'[Tagline],
			'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
			'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
			'dim_content'[Language],
			'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
			'dim_content'[Production Companies],
			__SQDS0BodyLimited,
			"M_Rank_Today", 'Key Measures'[M_Rank Today],
			"M_Display_RankChangeToday", 'Key Measures'[M_Display_RankChangeToday],
			"M_Display_Score_Typewise", 'Key Measures'[M_Display_Score_Typewise],
			"MinHomepage", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Homepage]))),
			"MinTrailer", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Trailer]))),
			"M_RankChangeToday", IGNORE('Key Measures'[M_RankChangeToday])
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			501,
			__DS0Core,
			[M_Rank_Today],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Poster],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Title],
			1,
			'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Genres],
			1,
			'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
			1,
			'dim_content'[RuntimeUnited],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Cast],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Tagline],
			1,
			'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Language],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Production Companies],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	GROUPBY(
		__DS0Core,
		"MinM_Display_Score_Typewise", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [M_Display_Score_Typewise]),
		"MaxM_Display_Score_Typewise", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [M_Display_Score_Typewise])
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[M_Rank_Today],
	'dim_content'[Poster],
	'dim_content'[Title],
	'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
	'dim_content'[Genres],
	'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
	'dim_content'[RuntimeUnited],
	'dim_content'[Cast],
	'dim_content'[Tagline],
	'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
	'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
	'dim_content'[Language],
	'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
	'dim_content'[Production Companies]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_content'[Poster],
			'dim_content'[Title],
			'dim_content'[Genres],
			'dim_content'[Score],
			'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
			'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime_Display],
			'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime],
			'dim_content'[Cast],
			'dim_content'[Tagline],
			'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
			'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
			'dim_content'[Language],
			'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
			'dim_content'[Production Companies],
			"M_RankTodayTypeWise", 'Key Measures'[M_RankTodayTypeWise],
			"M_Display_RankChangeTodayTypeWise", 'Key Measures'[M_Display_RankChangeTodayTypeWise],
			"MinHomepage", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Homepage]))),
			"MinTrailer", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Trailer]))),
			"SumScore", IGNORE(CALCULATE(SUM('dim_content'[Score]))),
			"M_RankChangeTodayTypeWise", IGNORE('Key Measures'[M_RankChangeTodayTypeWise])
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			501,
			__DS0Core,
			'dim_content'[Poster],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Title],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Genres],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Score],
			1,
			'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
			1,
			'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime],
			1,
			'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime_Display],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Cast],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Tagline],
			1,
			'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Language],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Production Companies],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	GROUPBY(
		__DS0Core,
		"MinSumScore", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [SumScore]),
		"MaxSumScore", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [SumScore])
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'dim_content'[Poster],
	'dim_content'[Title],
	'dim_content'[Genres],
	'dim_content'[Score],
	'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
	'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime],
	'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime_Display],
	'dim_content'[Cast],
	'dim_content'[Tagline],
	'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
	'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
	'dim_content'[Language],
	'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
	'dim_content'[Production Companies]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('dim_content'[HiddenGems])),
			AND('dim_content'[HiddenGems] <= 20, NOT(ISBLANK('dim_content'[HiddenGems])))
		)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_content'[Title],
			'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
			'dim_content'[RuntimeUnited],
			'dim_content'[OverviewShort],
			'dim_content'[Language],
			'dim_content'[Production Companies],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			"SumScore", CALCULATE(SUM('dim_content'[Score])),
			"MinPoster", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Poster])),
			"MinTypeDisplay", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[TypeDisplay])),
			"MinGenres", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Genres])),
			"MinCast", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Cast])),
			"MinNetworks", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Networks])),
			"MinSub_Genres", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Sub Genres])),
			"MinTrailerDisplay", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[TrailerDisplay]))),
			"MinHomepage", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Homepage])))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			501,
			__DS0Core,
			[SumScore],
			0,
			'dim_content'[Title],
			1,
			'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
			1,
			'dim_content'[RuntimeUnited],
			1,
			'dim_content'[OverviewShort],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Language],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Production Companies],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	GROUPBY(
		__DS0Core,
		"MinSumScore", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [SumScore]),
		"MaxSumScore", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [SumScore])
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[SumScore] DESC,
	'dim_content'[Title],
	'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
	'dim_content'[RuntimeUnited],
	'dim_content'[OverviewShort],
	'dim_content'[Language],
	'dim_content'[Production Companies]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_content'[Title],
			'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
			"M_RankChangeToday", 'Key Measures'[M_RankChangeToday],
			"M_Display_RankChangeToday", 'Key Measures'[M_Display_RankChangeToday],
			"M_Rank_Today", 'Key Measures'[M_Rank Today],
			"MinHomepage", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Homepage])))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(501, __DS0Core, 'dim_content'[Title], 1, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay], 1)

EVALUATE
	GROUPBY(
		__DS0Core,
		"MinM_Rank_Today", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [M_Rank_Today]),
		"MaxM_Rank_Today", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [M_Rank_Today])
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'dim_content'[Title], 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_content'[Title],
			'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
			"M_Display_RankChangeToday", 'Key Measures'[M_Display_RankChangeToday],
			"M_Rank_Today", 'Key Measures'[M_Rank Today],
			"M_RankChangeToday", 'Key Measures'[M_RankChangeToday],
			"MinHomepage", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Homepage])))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(501, __DS0Core, 'dim_content'[Title], 1, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay], 1)

EVALUATE
	GROUPBY(
		__DS0Core,
		"MinM_Rank_Today", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [M_Rank_Today]),
		"MaxM_Rank_Today", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [M_Rank_Today])
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'dim_content'[Title], 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('dim_content'[Score])), 'dim_content'[Score] >= 7)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime])),
			AND('dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime] <= 45, 'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime] > 0)
		)

	VAR __ValueFilterDM0 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
					'dim_content'[Poster],
					'dim_content'[Title],
					'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
					'dim_content'[Genres],
					'dim_content'[Score],
					'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime_Display],
					'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime],
					'dim_content'[TotalRuntime_Series_Display],
					'dim_content'[TotalRuntime_Series],
					'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
					'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
					'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
					'dim_content'[Tagline],
					'dim_content'[Language],
					'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
					__DS0FilterTable,
					__DS0FilterTable2,
					"M_Rank_Today", 'Key Measures'[M_Rank Today],
					"M_Display_RankChangeToday", 'Key Measures'[M_Display_RankChangeToday],
					"MinHomepage", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Homepage]))),
					"MinTrailer", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Trailer]))),
					"CountScore", IGNORE(CALCULATE(COUNTA('dim_content'[Score]))),
					"M_RankChangeToday", IGNORE('Key Measures'[M_RankChangeToday]),
					"M_TotalRuntime_Series", IGNORE('Key Measures'[M_TotalRuntime_Series])
				)
			),
			AND([M_TotalRuntime_Series] <= 480, [M_TotalRuntime_Series] > 0)
		)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_content'[Poster],
			'dim_content'[Title],
			'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
			'dim_content'[Genres],
			'dim_content'[Score],
			'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime_Display],
			'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime],
			'dim_content'[TotalRuntime_Series_Display],
			'dim_content'[TotalRuntime_Series],
			'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
			'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
			'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
			'dim_content'[Tagline],
			'dim_content'[Language],
			'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			__ValueFilterDM0,
			"M_Rank_Today", 'Key Measures'[M_Rank Today],
			"M_Display_RankChangeToday", 'Key Measures'[M_Display_RankChangeToday],
			"MinHomepage", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Homepage]))),
			"MinTrailer", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Trailer]))),
			"CountScore", IGNORE(CALCULATE(COUNTA('dim_content'[Score]))),
			"M_RankChangeToday", IGNORE('Key Measures'[M_RankChangeToday])
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			501,
			__DS0Core,
			'dim_content'[Score],
			0,
			'dim_content'[Poster],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Title],
			1,
			'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Genres],
			1,
			'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime],
			1,
			'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime_Display],
			1,
			'dim_content'[TotalRuntime_Series],
			1,
			'dim_content'[TotalRuntime_Series_Display],
			1,
			'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
			1,
			'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Tagline],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Language],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	GROUPBY(
		__DS0Core,
		"MinCountScore", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [CountScore]),
		"MaxCountScore", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [CountScore])
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'dim_content'[Score] DESC,
	'dim_content'[Poster],
	'dim_content'[Title],
	'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
	'dim_content'[Genres],
	'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime],
	'dim_content'[AVG_Episode_Runtime_Display],
	'dim_content'[TotalRuntime_Series],
	'dim_content'[TotalRuntime_Series_Display],
	'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
	'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
	'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
	'dim_content'[Tagline],
	'dim_content'[Language],
	'dim_content'[Sub Genres]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_content'[Poster],
			'dim_content'[Title],
			'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
			'dim_content'[Genres],
			'dim_content'[Score],
			'dim_content'[RuntimeDisplay],
			'dim_content'[Runtime (Min.)],
			'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
			'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
			'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
			'dim_content'[Tagline],
			'dim_content'[Language],
			'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
			"M_Rank_Today", 'Key Measures'[M_Rank Today],
			"M_Display_RankChangeToday", 'Key Measures'[M_Display_RankChangeToday],
			"MinHomepage", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Homepage]))),
			"MinTrailer", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[Trailer]))),
			"CountScore", IGNORE(CALCULATE(COUNTA('dim_content'[Score]))),
			"M_RankChangeToday", IGNORE('Key Measures'[M_RankChangeToday])
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			501,
			__DS0Core,
			'dim_content'[Poster],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Title],
			1,
			'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Genres],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Score],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Runtime (Min.)],
			1,
			'dim_content'[RuntimeDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
			1,
			'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
			1,
			'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Tagline],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Language],
			1,
			'dim_content'[Sub Genres],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	GROUPBY(
		__DS0Core,
		"MinCountScore", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [CountScore]),
		"MaxCountScore", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [CountScore])
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'dim_content'[Poster],
	'dim_content'[Title],
	'dim_content'[TypeDisplay],
	'dim_content'[Genres],
	'dim_content'[Score],
	'dim_content'[Runtime (Min.)],
	'dim_content'[RuntimeDisplay],
	'dim_content'[NetworksDisplay],
	'dim_content'[TrailerDisplay],
	'LocalDateTable_381e6972-092b-4886-93b6-985753040bbe'[Year],
	'dim_content'[Tagline],
	'dim_content'[Language],
	'dim_content'[Sub Genres]

DEFINE
	VAR __SQDS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"TV-Series"}, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay])

	VAR __SQDS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms"}, 'dim_content'[Title])

	VAR __SQDS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			DISTINCT('dim_content'[Title]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__SQDS0FilterTable),
			KEEPFILTERS(__SQDS0FilterTable2)
		)

	VAR __SQDS1Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			DISTINCT('dim_content'[Status]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__SQDS0FilterTable),
			KEEPFILTERS(__SQDS0FilterTable2)
		)

	VAR __FullOuterCrossJoinTableDS0_0 = 
		GROUPBY(__SQDS0Core, "MinTitle", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), 'dim_content'[Title], TRUE))

	VAR __FullOuterCrossJoinTableDS0_1 = 
		GROUPBY(__SQDS1Core, "MinStatus", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), 'dim_content'[Status], TRUE))

EVALUATE
	GENERATEALL(
		KEEPFILTERS(ROW(
			"Placeholder", BLANK()
		)),
		GENERATEALL(
			KEEPFILTERS(__FullOuterCrossJoinTableDS0_0),
			__FullOuterCrossJoinTableDS0_1
		)
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"TV-Series"}, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms"}, 'dim_content'[Title])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'fact_popularity'[loaddate],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			"SumRank", CALCULATE(SUM('fact_popularity'[Rank])),
			"SumRank_Change", IGNORE(CALCULATE(SUM('fact_popularity'[Rank Change])))
		)

	VAR __DS0IntersectionCount = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(__DS0Core))

	VAR __DS0BodyBinnedSample = 
		SAMPLEAXISWITHLOCALMINMAX(3500, __DS0Core, 'fact_popularity'[loaddate], [SumRank], 350, , ALPHABETICAL, ASC, 105000, 60)

EVALUATE
	ROW(
	"DS0IntersectionCount", __DS0IntersectionCount
)

EVALUATE
	GROUPBY(__DS0Core, "AverageSumRank", AVERAGEX(CURRENTGROUP(), [SumRank]))

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyBinnedSample

ORDER BY
	'fact_popularity'[loaddate]

DEFINE

		TREATAS({"TV-Series"}, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay])

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"TV-Series"}, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms"}, 'dim_content'[Title])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			SUMMARIZE('dim_person', 'dim_person'[Poster], 'dim_person'[Name]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable2)
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(101, __DS0Core, 'dim_person'[Poster], 1, 'dim_person'[Name], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'dim_person'[Poster], 'dim_person'[Name]

DEFINE
	VAR __SQDS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"TV-Series"}, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay])

	VAR __SQDS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms"}, 'dim_content'[Title])

	VAR __SQDS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_network'[Poster],
			__SQDS0FilterTable,
			__SQDS0FilterTable2,
			"Mincontent_id", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_content'[content_id]))
		)

	VAR __SQDS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1, __SQDS0Core, [Mincontent_id], 0)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			DISTINCT('dim_network'[Poster]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__SQDS0BodyLimited),
			KEEPFILTERS(__SQDS0FilterTable),
			KEEPFILTERS(__SQDS0FilterTable2)
		)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1002, __DS0Core, 'dim_network'[Poster], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	'dim_network'[Poster]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"TV-Series"}, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		"M_AVG_Series_Score", IGNORE('Key Measures'[M_AVG_Series_Score])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('dim_production_company'[Poster])),
			NOT(ISBLANK('dim_production_company'[Poster]))
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"TV-Series"}, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms"}, 'dim_content'[Title])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			DISTINCT('dim_production_company'[Poster]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable2),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable3)
		)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1002, __DS0Core, 'dim_production_company'[Poster], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	'dim_production_company'[Poster]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"TV-Series"}, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms"}, 'dim_content'[Title])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_season'[Name],
			'dim_season'[Season No.],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			"MinPoster", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_season'[Poster])),
			"MinAir_Date", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_season'[Air Date])),
			"SumTotal_Episodes", CALCULATE(SUM('dim_season'[Total Episodes])),
			"AverageScore", CALCULATE(AVERAGE('dim_episode'[Score])),
			"MinOverviewShort", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_season'[OverviewShort]))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(501, __DS0Core, 'dim_season'[Season No.], 1, 'dim_season'[Name], 1)

EVALUATE
	GROUPBY(
		__DS0Core,
		"MinAverageScore", MINX(CURRENTGROUP(), [AverageScore]),
		"MaxAverageScore", MAXX(CURRENTGROUP(), [AverageScore])
	)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'dim_season'[Season No.], 'dim_season'[Name]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"actress",
			"actor"}, 'bridge_content_person'[role_type])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"TV-Series"}, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms"}, 'dim_content'[Title])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
					'dim_person'[Poster],
					__DS0FilterTable,
					__DS0FilterTable2,
					__DS0FilterTable3,
					"Sumorder_no", CALCULATE(SUM('bridge_content_person'[order_no])),
					"MinName", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_person'[Name])),
					"Mincharacter_names", CALCULATE(MIN('bridge_content_person'[character_names])),
					"MinHomepage", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_person'[Homepage])))
				)
			),
			NOT(ISBLANK([Sumorder_no]))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(501, __DS0Core, [Sumorder_no], 1, 'dim_person'[Poster], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[Sumorder_no], 'dim_person'[Poster]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('dim_production_company'[Poster])),
			NOT(ISBLANK('dim_production_company'[Poster]))
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"Movie"}, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		CALCULATETABLE(
			DISTINCT('dim_production_company'[Poster]),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable),
			KEEPFILTERS(__DS0FilterTable2)
		)

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1002, __DS0Core, 'dim_production_company'[Poster], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	'dim_production_company'[Poster]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"actress",
			"actor"}, 'bridge_content_person'[role_type])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"Movie"}, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
					'dim_person'[Poster],
					__DS0FilterTable,
					__DS0FilterTable2,
					"Sumorder_no", CALCULATE(SUM('bridge_content_person'[order_no])),
					"MinName", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_person'[Name])),
					"Mincharacter_names", CALCULATE(MIN('bridge_content_person'[character_names])),
					"MinHomepage", IGNORE(CALCULATE(MIN('dim_person'[Homepage])))
				)
			),
			NOT(ISBLANK([Sumorder_no]))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(501, __DS0Core, [Sumorder_no], 1, 'dim_person'[Poster], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[Sumorder_no], 'dim_person'[Poster]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Season 1"}, 'dim_season'[Name])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"TV-Series"}, 'dim_content'[TypeDisplay])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		TREATAS({"A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms"}, 'dim_content'[Title])

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'dim_episode'[Episode No],
			'dim_episode'[Poster],
			'dim_episode'[Score],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			__DS0FilterTable3,
			"MinTitle", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_episode'[Title])),
			"MinTypeDisplay", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_episode'[TypeDisplay])),
			"MinRuntimeDisplay", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_episode'[RuntimeDisplay])),
			"M_Earliest_Air_Date", 'Key Measures'[M_Earliest Air Date],
			"M_totalVote", 'Key Measures'[M_totalVote],
			"v_M_totalVote_FormatString", IGNORE('Key Measures'[_M_totalVote FormatString])
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			501,
			__DS0Core,
			'dim_episode'[Episode No],
			1,
			'dim_episode'[Poster],
			1,
			'dim_episode'[Score],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'dim_episode'[Episode No], 'dim_episode'[Poster], 'dim_episode'[Score]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL(
				ROLLUPGROUP('dim_episode'[Poster], 'dim_episode'[Episode No], 'dim_episode'[Score]), "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"
			),
			"MinTitle", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_episode'[Title])),
			"MinTypeDisplay", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_episode'[TypeDisplay])),
			"MinRuntimeDisplay", CALCULATE(MIN('dim_episode'[RuntimeDisplay])),
			"M_Earliest_Air_Date", 'Key Measures'[M_Earliest Air Date],
			"M_totalVote", 'Key Measures'[M_totalVote],
			"v_M_totalVote_FormatString", IGNORE('Key Measures'[_M_totalVote FormatString])
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			502,
			__DS0Core,
			[IsGrandTotalRowTotal],
			0,
			'dim_episode'[Episode No],
			1,
			'dim_episode'[Poster],
			1,
			'dim_episode'[Score],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC,
	'dim_episode'[Episode No],
	'dim_episode'[Poster],
	'dim_episode'[Score]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		DISTINCT('dim_content'[Poster])

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1002, __DS0Core, 'dim_content'[Poster], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	'dim_content'[Poster]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		DISTINCT('dim_person'[Poster])

	VAR __DS0BodyLimited = 
		TOPN(1002, __DS0Core, 'dim_person'[Poster], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0BodyLimited

ORDER BY
	'dim_person'[Poster]
